utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh well , it is not on TV yet .

utterances.speaker: The Dry Cleaner
utterances.text: Well , then it is not on the wall yet .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Okay , fine , I will bring you a tape , huh ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: So umm , now do you have any of Matt Lauer clothes here ? Maybe ? Just ones that have not been cleaned yet ?
